privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create a 3D solid from a 40x30mm 2D rectangular sketch. The task setup scripts and verifier.py comments reveal an expectation of a 15mm extrude depth, but this specific depth requirement is entirely missing from the task description provided to the agent. The agent starts from a blank canvas and is expected to save the output to "/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/block.slvs".
